_comment: Dynamic.xyz test-mode credentials for dogfooding BUFI without a real wallet. Bypasses MetaMask/SIWE entirely — Dynamic provisions a Turnkey embedded wallet on first login.

email.pattern: any email with +dynamic_test<suffix> before the @ — the suffix can be anything (alpha, qa1, echo, etc.) to spread parallel-agent load across distinct identities and avoid Cloudflare WAF rate limits

_usage.ui: Click 'Log in or sign up' → choose Email or Phone → enter test value → enter OTP 967140
_usage.browse: After page loads, drive Dynamic widget input fields and submit OTP
_usage.parallel_agents: ALWAYS use a varied suffix per agent (alpha/bravo/echo/etc.). Otherwise Cloudflare WAF rate-limits the email and returns 403 — which browsers report as a CORS error but is actually rate-limit fallout.
_usage.rate_limit_window: If you hit a 403/429 from app.dynamicauth.com, wait 15-30 min OR switch to a different +dynamic_test<suffix>@ variant.
